name: How to prove partial fault in lawyer's AI citation error?

mainEntity.name: How to prove partial fault in lawyer's AI citation error?

acceptedAnswer.text: Via prompts/comms showing your role; comparative fault.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Show your input reliance or instructions led to error. Levidow full fault for no verification.[1] Key factors: prompt records, communications. Argue comparative negligence reduces liability. Gather chats.
